steps.title: Use what initial deposit means
steps.content: The initial deposit is the account balance at the start. Since $x$ is months since the initial deposit, the starting time is $x=0$.

steps.title: Read the y-intercept
steps.content: At $x=0$, the graph crosses the $y$-axis at $10$. The graph is measuring dollars, so the estimated starting balance was $10.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The question asks for the amount of the initial deposit to the nearest whole dollar. Since $f(0)=10$, the answer is 10.
